title: Proposal for a Council Decision on the position to be taken by the Community within the EU-Slovak Republic Association Council established by the Europe Agreement between the European Communities and their Member States, of the one part, and the Slovak Republic, of the other part, which entered into force on 1 February 1995, extending the double-checking system for the period from 1 January to 31 December 2002, concerning the export of certain steel products from the Slovak Republic to the Community
